title: Hungary’s Orbán urges party ‘renewal’ after vote loss
summary_full: Orbán lost on Sunday to political newcomer, conservative pro-EU Péter Magyar, whose party won a two-thirds parliamentary majority
summary_public: Orbán lost on Sunday to political newcomer, conservative pro-EU Péter Magyar, whose party won a two-thirds parliamentary majority

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: conservative pro-EU Péter Magyar, whose party won a two-thirds parliamentary majority
